DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $500 ARE TO BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
